feature: Show Only Primary Vet on Emergency Card
summary: Filter the emergency card API to return only the primary vet instead of all vets. If no primary vet is set, return an empty array. The Care Team tab continues to show all vets.

tasks.title: Filter veterinarians to primary-only in buildEmergencyCard
tasks.description: Replace the veterinarians mapping in buildEmergencyCard (public.ts lines 142-147) with an IIFE that finds the primary vet and returns it as a single-element array, or an empty array if none is primary. This follows the exact same pattern used for emergency_contacts on lines 150-159.
acceptance_criteria: The veterinarians field uses an IIFE matching the emergency_contacts pattern at lines 150-159
vets.find(v => v.is_primary) is used to locate the primary vet
When no primary vet exists, an empty array [] is returned (no fallback to first vet)
When a primary vet exists, exactly one element is returned with fields: clinic_name, vet_name, phone, is_primary
The getPetVets(pet.id) call at line 63 is NOT modified
No other lines in the file are changed
Comment above the block reads: // Veterinarian info -- only show primary vet on emergency card

tasks.title: Add structural verification tests for primary vet filtering
tasks.description: Create a test file using the structural verification approach (reading public.ts source and asserting on content patterns). This matches the established pattern in pets.test.ts and set-primary-emergency-contact.test.ts.
acceptance_criteria: Test file imports vitest (describe, it, expect) and fs/promises
Test asserts the veterinarians field uses vets.find(v => v.is_primary) not vets.map
Test asserts that when no primary vet is found an empty array is returned
Test asserts the result is wrapped in a single-element array with clinic_name, vet_name, phone, is_primary fields
Test asserts getPetVets is still called without filtering (shared query unchanged)
Test asserts the emergency_contacts IIFE pattern is still intact (regression check)
All tests pass with: npx vitest run backend/src/__tests__/primary-vet-emergency-card.test.ts
